name: Slow Cooker Baked Ham with Mustard Glaze
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds precooked ham (up to 5 lbs), drained
recipeInstructions:
Serves 12 to 15
Score the ham in a diamond pattern and stud with cloves. Place in Crock-Pot.
Combine the brown sugar, mustard, and lemon juice in a bowl. Spoon the mixture over the ham. Cover and cook on High for 1 hour, then on Low for 6 to 7 hours or until the ham is hot.
Remove the ham from the Crock-Pot to a warm serving platter. Turn the Crock-Pot to High setting.
Combine the orange juice and cornstarch in a bowl to form a smooth paste. Stir into the drippings in the Crock-Pot, stirring occasionally. Cook until the sauce is thickened. Spoon over the ham.
For 5 or more quart units: If cooking a large ham, cook for 1 hour on High, then on Low for 8 to 10 hours.
